_comment: Font Awesome CDN yerine kullanilacak inline SVG ikonlari. Lucide-style, 24x24 viewBox, stroke=currentColor. <i class='fa-... fa-NAME'> yerine bu SVG gomulur. currentColor sayesinde mevcut renk/font-size'i miras alir.
_usage: Her etiketini, ilgili NAME'in svg'siyle degistir. Boyut icin svg'ye width/height ekle veya CSS'te .icon{width:1em;height:1em} kullan. Renk currentColor ile gelir.

icons.fa-arrow-right: <svg class="svg-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M5 12h14"/><path d="M13 6l6 6-6 6"/></svg>
icons.fa-chevron-right: <svg class="svg-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M9 6l6 6-6 6"/></svg>
icons.fa-clock: <svg class="svg-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9"/><path d="M12 7v5l3.5 2"/></svg>
icons.fa-tag: <svg class="svg-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M3 12l9-9h6a3 3 0 013 3v6l-9 9z"/><circle cx="15" cy="9" r="1.4" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/></svg>
icons.fa-flag: <svg class="svg-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M5 21V4"/><path d="M5 4h12l-2.5 4L17 12H5"/></svg>
icons.fa-layer-group: <svg class="svg-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 3l9 5-9 5-9-5 9-5z"/><path d="M3 12l9 5 9-5"/><path d="M3 16l9 5 9-5"/></svg>
icons.fa-credit-card: <svg class="svg-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><rect x="3" y="5" width="18" height="14" rx="2"/><path d="M3 10h18"/></svg>
icons.fa-plus-circle: <svg class="svg-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9"/><path d="M12 8v8"/><path d="M8 12h8"/></svg>
icons.fa-copy: <svg class="svg-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><rect x="9" y="9" width="11" height="11" rx="2"/><path d="M5 15V5a2 2 0 012-2h8"/></svg>
icons.fa-bolt: <svg class="svg-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M13 2L4 14h6l-1 8 9-12h-6l1-8z"/></svg>
icons.fa-square: <svg class="svg-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><rect x="4" y="4" width="16" height="16" rx="2"/></svg>
icons.fa-circle-check: <svg class="svg-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9"/><path d="M8 12l3 3 5-6"/></svg>
icons.fa-xmark: <svg class="svg-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M6 6l12 12"/><path d="M18 6L6 18"/></svg>
